# DeepSeek Skills

Skills and instructions for using [DeepSeek](https://www.deepseek.com/) AI models with the SHAFT test automation framework.

## About DeepSeek

DeepSeek is an advanced AI model known for its strong reasoning and code generation capabilities, particularly effective for complex programming tasks.

## Available Skills

_No skills have been added yet. Contributions are welcome!_

## Notes

- DeepSeek models excel at code analysis, debugging, and generating test automation code
- When using DeepSeek with SHAFT, provide context about the framework's fluent API patterns for best results
